creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-07-16 14:30:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/qtm        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  QTM allows the user to compose, format and submit entries to MT and
  Wordpress blogs (and possibly other content management systems using the
  same interfaces; your mileage may vary).  It uses the standard Blogger,
  MetaWeblog and Movable Type APIs.  It requires Qt 4.1.
  
  WWW: http://qtm.blogistan.co.uk/
  
  PR:             ports/113931
  Submitted by:   Yinghong.Liu <relaxbsd at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.301     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/deskutils/qtm/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/qtm/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/deskutils/qtm/pkg-descr (new)
